challenges.title: Simple Spinner
challenges.description: Create a spinning loading indicator using rotate animation.
challenges.hint: Use @keyframes with from/to for rotate from 0 to 360deg.

solution.css: @keyframes spin { from { rotate: 0deg; } to { rotate: 360deg; } } .spinner { animation: spin 1s linear infinite; }

challenges.title: Hover Spin Button
challenges.description: A button that spins 360 degrees on hover.
challenges.hint: Use transition on rotate property with :hover.

challenges.title: Card Flip (3D)
challenges.description: Create a card that flips to reveal back content on hover using Y-axis rotation.
challenges.hint: Use rotate: Y 180deg, perspective on parent, and backface-visibility.
challenges.expected_outcome: Card flips like a playing card.

solution.css: .scene { perspective: 800px; } .card { transition: rotate 0.6s; transform-style: preserve-3d; } .card:hover { rotate: Y 180deg; } .front, .back { backface-visibility: hidden; } .back { rotate: Y 180deg; }

challenges.title: Transform Origin Clock Hand
challenges.description: Create a clock-like hand that rotates from its bottom center.
challenges.hint: Use transform-origin: bottom center with rotate animation.
challenges.expected_outcome: Hand rotates from bottom center like a clock hand.

solution.css: .hand { width: 4px; height: 80px; background: #333; transform-origin: bottom center; animation: tick 60s linear infinite; } @keyframes tick { from { rotate: 0deg; } to { rotate: 360deg; } }

challenges.title: 3D Cube Rotator
challenges.description: Create a 3D cube that rotates continuously on all axes.
challenges.hint: Use transform-style: preserve-3d, multiple faces positioned with translateZ, and rotate animation on the cube container.
challenges.expected_outcome: A 3D cube that spins in space.

solution.css: .cube { transform-style: preserve-3d; animation: spin 5s linear infinite; } @keyframes spin { 0% { rotate: X 0deg Y 0deg; } 100% { rotate: X 360deg Y 360deg; } }
